---
name: New Subject Skill Pack
about: Contribute a skill pack for a subject area
title: "[Skill] "
labels: subject-skill, contribution
assignees: ''
---

**Subject area**
<!-- e.g., Chemistry, World Languages (Spanish), Physical Education -->

**Grade level(s)**
<!-- e.g., 9-12, K-5, 6-8 -->

**What makes great lessons in this subject?**
<!-- What pedagogical patterns, activities, or structures are essential? -->

**Key vocabulary / concepts students should master**
<!-- List the big ideas or terms that come up repeatedly -->

**Common assessment types**
<!-- e.g., lab reports, oral presentations, proofs, performances -->

**Common differentiation strategies**
<!-- How do experienced teachers in this subject differentiate? -->

**Are you willing to contribute the code?**
<!-- Yes / No / I'd like help — all answers are welcome! -->

**Reference**
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#how-to-add-a-new-subject-skill) for the full guide on adding a subject skill.
